column1: - Rates include fuel surcharge, 0% VAT, and environmental surcharge. Other surcharges (remote area, oversize, etc.) are not included if applicable.
Chargeable weight is calculated based on the higher value between actual weight and volumetric weight.
Only square or rectangular packaging is accepted
- Address change fee: VND 600,000 per shipment
- War zone delivery surcharge: VND 3,000,000 per shipment
- Remote area surcharge: Minimum VND 1,200,000 per shipment or VND 20,500/kg

- Customs surcharge applies to: High-value goods, Cultural items (books, newspapers, tapes, discs), Wooden/ceramic/statue items, Machinery, Mechanical watches, Battery-powered goods, Agarwood products (chips, incense, agarwood, etc.),…
Fumigation required (additional charge applies, depending on destination)
- Pickup surcharge (only applies when SGL staff picks up directly from customer location):
+ Under 10 shipments per pickup: VND 50,000 per pickup
+ From 10 shipments or more: Free of charge
Items prohibited by law (drugs precursors, cash, weapons, etc.)
In case of damage or loss: compensation will be applied according to SGLINK policy.
Shipments that fail to meet import requirements at destination and are seized, detained, or returned by customs:
For returned shipments, return shipping costs to Vietnam will be borne by the shipper.
